name: wa_two_windows
drl:
rule W1 when accumulate( E($v : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($v) ) then end
rule W2 when accumulate( E($v : val) over window:time(200ms); $c : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): per-node independence: one update revives the member at the N=100 node (evicted there) while re-folding it at the N=200 node (still in); the N=200 eviction later pops it there while the N=100 zombie persists.
